languages.text: "Вы — в странном положении. Придет время, и они привыкнут вам доверять".
"You are in a strange position. Give it time — they will grow used to trusting you."
languages.original_text: "Вы — в странном положении. Придет время, и они привыкнут вам доверять".

traits.locale_text: "You are in a strange position. Give it time — they will grow used to trusting you."
"You are in a strange position. Give it time — they will grow used to trusting you."
"You are in a strange position. Give it time — they will grow used to trusting you."

languages.text: 「あなたは奇妙な立場にいる。時間をかけて、彼らはあなたを信頼するようになるだろう」
languages.original_text: "You are in a strange position. Give it time — they will grow used to trusting you."

languages.text: "Garip bir konumdasın. Zaman ver. Sana güvenmeye alışacaklar."
languages.original_text: "You are in a strange position. Give it time — they will grow used to trusting you."

traits.locale_text: "Garip bir konumdasın. Zaman ver. Sana güvenmeye alışacaklar."

languages.text: “你们的处境特殊。假以时日，他们会慢慢学会信任你们。”
languages.original_text: "You are in a strange position. Give it time — they will grow used to trusting you."

traits.locale_text: “你们的处境特殊。假以时日，他们会慢慢学会信任你们。”

languages.text: "Ihr seid in einer seltsamen Position. Habt Geduld ... sie werden sich daran gewöhnen, Euch zu vertrauen."
languages.original_text: "You are in a strange position. Give it time — they will grow used to trusting you."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid in einer seltsamen Position. Habt Geduld ... sie werden sich daran gewöhnen, Euch zu vertrauen."

languages.text: « Il faut admettre que vous êtes dans une position pour le moins étrange. Donnez-leur du temps. Ils finiront par vous faire confiance. »
languages.original_text: "You are in a strange position. Give it time — they will grow used to trusting you."

traits.locale_text: « Il faut admettre que vous êtes dans une position pour le moins étrange. Donnez-leur du temps. Ils finiront par vous faire confiance. »

languages.text: «Está en una posición extraña. Dele tiempo y se acostumbrarán a confiar en usted».
languages.original_text: "You are in a strange position. Give it time — they will grow used to trusting you."

traits.locale_text: «Está en una posición extraña. Dele tiempo y se acostumbrarán a confiar en usted».
